response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content to identify performer (Takane Lui) and song titles via on-screen text. 2. Identified Song 1 as 'Sayonara Elegy' by Masaki Suda and Song 2 as 'IRIS OUT' by Kenshi Yonezu. 3. Used search tool to find full lyrics for both songs in original language and English translation (transcribed for the original song 'IRIS OUT' based on the audio performance due to lack of official published lyrics online). 4. Mapped scenes based on song performance times. 5. Formatted as JSON according to requirements, ensuring correct escaping.
response.global_summary: A live performance video featuring VTuber Takane Lui performing two vocal songs: 'Sayonara Elegy' and an original song titled 'IRIS OUT'.

scenes.description: Takane Lui performs 'Sayonara Elegy' on a stage with a castle backdrop. The performance includes dancing and lighting effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
僕はいま 無口な空に
吐き出した 孤独という名の雲
その雲が雨を降らせて
虹が出る どうせ掴めないのに
はじめてのキスを繰り返して欲しくて
愛が僕に噛みついて 離さないと言うけれど
さみしさのカタチは変わらない見たいだ
舞い上がって行け いつか夜の向こう側
うんざりするほど光れ君の歌
やさしさが濁った日々の
憂鬱は満員電車見たいだ
冷たぬくもりをむやみに放り投げた
僕が愛を信じても きっといなくなるんだろ?
それならいらない 悲しすぎるから
さようならさえも上手く言えなそうだから
手をふるかわりに抱きしめてみたよ
流れ星をみた 流れ星をみた
願う僕の歌
そばにいるだけで本当幸せだったな
そばにいるだけでただそれだけでさ
愛が僕に噛みついて 離さないと言うけれど
さみしさのカタチは変わらない見たいだ
舞い上がって行け いつか夜の向こう側
うんざりするほど光れ君の歌
もう傷つかない もう傷つけない
光れ君の歌
終わり
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I am now, facing the silent sky
I spat out a cloud named loneliness
That cloud brings rain
And a rainbow appears, even though I can't catch it anyway
I want to repeat our first kiss
Even though love bites me and says it won't let go
The shape of loneliness doesn't seem to change
Fly up high, someday to the other side of the night
Let your song shine until it's sickening
The depression of days when kindness has become murky
Is like a crowded train
I carelessly threw away the cooled warmth
Even if I believe in love, it'll surely disappear, right?
If so, I don't need it because it's too sad
Because it seems I can't even say goodbye properly
I tried hugging you instead of waving my hand
I saw a shooting star, I saw a shooting star
My song of prayer
It was truly happiness just being by your side
Just being by your side, just that was enough
Love bites me and says it won't let go
The shape of loneliness doesn't seem to change
Fly up high, someday to the other side of the night
Let your song shine until it's sickening
I won't be hurt anymore, I won't hurt anyone anymore
Shine, your song
Ending

scenes.description: Takane Lui performs her original song 'IRIS OUT'. The stage features vibrant lighting, neon effects, and a digital concert display. The text 'IRIS OUT' and 'Lyrics/Music: Kenshi Yonezu' is shown on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Stop, stop, stop, stop
From inside my brain, stop it
I keep screaming and raging like a fool
Darling baby, darling
I'm overcome by the outrageous club and glittering
Uki-ashi (floating) philosophy of tomorrow
So cute that I could die, ultra-main sky
Something touches it, Kimi-gawaru-why
Scatter the anxieties, if I notice I'm already in it
Born into this world, it's your fault
Unusually heavy love, I don't have to say it
Scattered head and this body
Kedo-myaku-nai, I love you, bursting out
I don't know what to do
What to do with this feeling
Abarano-kuon, it's everywhere
My eyes are melting, it's about to become un-done
Where to go, tearing and drowning into it
Right now in this world, only you are the universe
Darling, darling, darling, darling
If you flip it over, it's worthless
Only you, the rules are different
Even if I push them all, it's only black, all-you-can-eat
Smile, and release it
Break the fields, the iron is not enough, I'm sorry
Ya-o-sa-shite, piercing through
Where is the weakness? It's so cute I could die
Ultra-main sky
Something touches it, Kimi-gawaru-why
Scatter the anxieties, if I notice I'm already in it
Born into this world, it's your fault
Anything is fine, anything is fine
I want everything that is clicking with you right now
So cute that I could die, ultra-main sky
Something touches it, Kimi-gawaru-why
IRIS OUT
